# Validate MBS parser against one manually downloaded XML release

Epic: `LIVE-001` — Reviewed live-source validation

Labels: type:parser, phase:1-slice, needs-clinical-review, status:blocked

Status: `blocked`

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`. Refine the acceptance criteria
before opening it in GitHub.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Parser contract and synthetic XML fixture are implemented.
- [ ] A real manually downloaded XML release is present in ignored local storage.
- [ ] Source URL, terms and checksum are recorded by an accountable reviewer.
- [ ] Parser output is validated without redistributing restricted descriptors.
